headings.text: Advantages of Our CNC Milling/Turning Aluminum 6063 Components
Specifications of CNC Milling/Turning Aluminum 6063 Components

meta_description: Junying precision CNC aluminum 6063 components go through milling, turning, drilling and more processes.

sections.heading: CNC Milling/Turning Aluminum 6063 Components
sections.text: CNC Milling/Turning Aluminum 6063 Components Junying precision CNC aluminum 6063 components go through milling, turning, drilling and more processes, equipped with 6 advanced CNC milling centers and skilled operators, our 6063 aluminum CNC products can reach your custom requirements. Aluminum 6063 is a medium-strength aluminum alloy with magnesium and silicon as the alloying elements. It has good mechanical properties, smooth surface, high corrosion resistance, can be heat-treated, welded and anodized, perfect for architectural industry and extrusion applications. Advantages of Our CNC Milling/Turning Aluminum 6063 Components – Full inspection throughout the whole CNC aluminum parts product...
